title: Amsterdam Compiler Kit
body: The Amsterdam Compiler Kit (ACK) is a retargetable compiler suite and toolchain written by Andrew Tanenbaum and Ceriel Jacobs, since 2005 maintained by David Given. It has frontends for the following programming languages: C, Pascal, Modula-2, BASIC, and Occam.
categories: Articles with unsourced statements from November 2025
